summary.interpretation: GraphQL and MCP should return the same core MiSArch product data. MCP adds agent-facing metadata and protocol-level tool discovery. Agent-generated GraphQL is optional and measures whether the model can produce valid native GraphQL from schema documentation. Pending-order comparisons are disabled unless explicitly enabled because they create shopping cart items and pending orders.

currentVersion.description: Two Wi-Fi smart plugs with scheduling and energy monitoring.

llm_controller.raw_output: {"executor":"fixed_graphql_catalog_lookup","arguments":{"top_k":2},"rationale":"Use the safe pre-written catalog lookup to read real MiSArch product data and return up to 2 products."}

decision.rationale: Use the safe pre-written catalog lookup to read real MiSArch product data and return up to 2 products.

agent_generated_graphql.raw_model_output: {"list_query":"query ListProducts($first: Int!) { products(first: $first) { nodes { id defaultVariant { id currentVersion { name description retailPrice } } categories(first: 10) { nodes { name } } } } }","list_variables":{"first":2},"detail_query":"query ProductDetails($id: UUID!) { product(id: $id) { id defaultVariant { id currentVersion { name description retailPrice } } categories(first: 10) { nodes { name } } } }","detail_variables":{"id":"$PRODUCT_ID_FROM_LIST"},"notes":"List gets the first 2 products; detail fetches one product by UUID with matching comparison fields."}

generated_plan.list_query: query ListProducts($first: Int!) { products(first: $first) { nodes { id defaultVariant { id currentVersion { name description retailPrice } } categories(first: 10) { nodes { name } } } } }
generated_plan.detail_query: query ProductDetails($id: UUID!) { product(id: $id) { id defaultVariant { id currentVersion { name description retailPrice } } categories(first: 10) { nodes { name } } } }
generated_plan.notes: List gets the first 2 products; detail fetches one product by UUID with matching comparison fields.

tools.description: Create a pending MiSArch order for a selected product variant. Controlled side effect: creates a shopping cart item and pending order only; does not place the order or trigger payment.

user_id.description: MiSArch user UUID owning the shopping cart and order

product_variant_id.description: MiSArch product variant UUID selected by the agent

quantity.description: number of items to reserve in the pending order; allowed range 1 to 3

shipment_method_id.description: MiSArch shipment method UUID to use for this order item

shipment_address_id.description: MiSArch user address UUID where the order should be shipped

invoice_address_id.description: MiSArch user address UUID used for invoicing

payment_information_id.description: MiSArch payment information UUID; payment is not triggered by this tool

coupon_ids.description: optional MiSArch coupon UUIDs to attach to the order item

tools.name: create_pending_order

tools.description: Get one public MiSArch catalog product by UUID. Read-only. No side effects.

product_id.description: MiSArch product UUID returned by list_products

tools.name: get_product

tools.description: List up to 10 public MiSArch catalog products. Read-only. No side effects.

top_k.description: maximum number of products to return; optional; default 5; allowed range 1 to 10

tools.name: list_products

product.description: Two Wi-Fi smart plugs with scheduling and energy monitoring.
product.name: HomeLink Smart Plug Twin Pack

decision.rationale: First list a small set of public catalog products to obtain a valid product UUID, then fetch one product in detail using that returned ID.

agent_generated_graphql.raw_model_output: {"list_query":"query ListProducts($first: Int!) { products(first: $first) { nodes { product_id: id defaultVariant { variant_id: id currentVersion { name description retailPrice } } categories(first: 10) { nodes { name } } } } }","list_variables":{"first":2},"detail_query":"query ProductDetails($id: UUID!) { product(id: $id) { product_id: id defaultVariant { variant_id: id currentVersion { name description retailPrice } } categories(first: 10) { nodes { name } } } }","detail_variables":{"id":"$PRODUCT_ID_FROM_LIST"},"notes":"Both queries return product_id, variant_id, name, description, retailPrice, and category names; category paging is fixed at 10."}

generated_plan.list_query: query ListProducts($first: Int!) { products(first: $first) { nodes { product_id: id defaultVariant { variant_id: id currentVersion { name description retailPrice } } categories(first: 10) { nodes { name } } } } }
generated_plan.detail_query: query ProductDetails($id: UUID!) { product(id: $id) { product_id: id defaultVariant { variant_id: id currentVersion { name description retailPrice } } categories(first: 10) { nodes { name } } } }
generated_plan.notes: Both queries return product_id, variant_id, name, description, retailPrice, and category names; category paging is fixed at 10.
